title: Cal-i-Vaun
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Cal}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Cal-i-Vaun |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind]]'' |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] **[[Temple Security Force]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Is she here at the Temple?''"
"''Yes, I show no record of departure.|Qui-Gon Jinn and Cal-i-Vaun, speaking of Tahl|}} '''Cal-i-Vaun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Part of the [[Temple Security Force]], Cal-i-Vaun was stationed at a checkpoint at one of the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] many entrances. ==Biography== A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Cal-i-Vaun was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Eventually, Cal-i-Vaun was elevated to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].{{CSWECite|I|104|Cal-i-Vaun}} In [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]], Cal-i-Vaun was manning a checkpoint in the Temple's [[Jedi Temple/Legends|docking complex]]. He stopped Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his Padawan, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], from entering without checking in first. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Cal-i-Vaun#legends |pt=Legends:Cal-i-Vaun }} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Knights]]
